summary: High‑energy Oakland second set with a soaring Stella Blue; solid soundboard mix but only the second half of the show is present.
review: Fans rave about the electric atmosphere of these Oakland shows, especially the emotional rendition of “Stella Blue” right after Jerry’s return from his coma. The recording is praised as a clean, well‑balanced sound‑board capture, though reviewers note the absence of the first set which leaves the release feeling incomplete.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong show enthusiasm (two 5/4‑star reviews) combined with generally good soundboard quality, offset by the missing first set which moderates the overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the mix as clear and gorgeous; no major flaws mentioned, but the release only contains the second set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set only; reviewers highlight the intense crowd energy and emotional impact of the post‑coma performance, though the lack of the first set is a noted drawback.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as an emotional focal point after his coma, with the crowd reacting viscerally to his playing on Stella Blue.
